creator: fishy@hotbot.com
text:
If I am reading the source code for timed.c correctly, the -F flag is
indeed meant for listing trusted hosts. Also, if no trusted hosts are
defined via the F flag, timed will apparently set the local machine's
hostname as trusted.

I will investigate this more thoroughly when I get back from work
tommorow, and I will see what I can do about the organizational issues
that you mentioned

- Nick
